calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Capital One Bank.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering the declaration of Tracy Taylor, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Ismael Morales as follows:
Principal $1,742.51
Prejudgment Interest $166.32
Attorney's Fees $500.00
Costs $250.00, for a total of $2658.83
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
